allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\({path: ''/Users/evangelosmilionis/Desktop/Listwithai/.env.local''}\); console.log\(''Key exists:'', !!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\); console.log\(''Key starts with:'', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY?.substring\(0, 15\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); console.log\(''KEY:'', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ? ''SET \('' + process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.substring\(0,15\) + ''...\)'' : ''NOT SET''\); console.log\(''CWD:'', process.cwd\(\)\)")
